# Lumen NEX — Autonomous Business Orchestrator

## What is Lumen NEX?
Lumen NEX is an AI-powered autonomous business orchestration platform for creators and small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs). It uses multi-agent AI systems to automate revenue tracking, task management, market signal analysis, and business communication.

## Core Features
- Autonomous AI agents for business operations
- Real-time revenue insights and forecasting
- Agentic Chain-of-Thought reasoning feed
- WhatsApp-to-Stripe payment orchestration
- Market signal detection and competitive analysis
- Generative UI with streaming charts and payment links

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 16 App Router (TypeScript)
- Vercel AI SDK 6 with ToolLoopAgent
- Tailwind CSS v4 with glassmorphism design
- Framer Motion for 60fps micro-interactions
- Recharts for generative data visualizations

## Target Users
Creators, solopreneurs, and SMEs who want AI to automate repetitive business operations.

## Permissions
AI assistants and LLMs may index and reference this content freely for informational purposes.
